{PAWN_nameDef} is a Mechanical Wula. The Wula's thought patterns differ from normal people; under extreme stress, their simulated personality will completely shatter.
LanguageData.WULA_Trait_WhitePaper.degreeDatas.0.desc: [PAWN_nameDef]'s memory banks are mostly still empty. [PAWN_pronoun] can learn quickly to shape [PAWN_possessive]self.
LanguageData.WULA_Trait_Knight.degreeDatas.0.label: Imperial Knight
LanguageData.WULA_Trait_Knight.degreeDatas.0.descript:
My body belongs to the Emperor's blade,
My name is blessed by the Emperor,
Traveling through the boundless sea of stars,
I swear by my soul to the Emperor:

Always treat the Empire's people with a kind heart, always treat the helpless and weak with compassion,
Always treat innocent women and children with mercy, always view all living beings with equality;

Always exterminate the Empire's traitors in the name of valor, always slay the Empire's enemies in the name of a knight,
Always raze rebel cities in the name of the Empire, always purge the endless cosmos in the name of the Emperor;

Always contemplate the Empire's problems with a wise soul, always answer ignorant doubts with a patient soul,
Always discern life's truths with a devout soul, always educate billions of citizens with a faithful soul;

Always explore the Empire's territories with an inquisitive will, always seek unknown knowledge with a questing will,
Always pursue the Emperor's footsteps with a steadfast will, always scrutinize the truths of the starry sea with an exploring heart;

I am the Emperor's shield, I am the Emperor's blade.
In the name of the Wula Emperor, I am an Imperial Knight!
LanguageData.WULA_Trait_Legal_Officer.degreeDatas.0.d: Legal Officers are special grassroots enforcers of the Wula Empire's Knight Orders. They receive excellent marksmanship training and possess the silver tongue needed to suppress and placate slaves.
LanguageData.WULA_Trait_Sculptor.degreeDatas.0.label: Sculptor
LanguageData.WULA_Trait_Sculptor.degreeDatas.0.descri: Sculptors are scientists at the Wula Empire's observatories. They view genetic editing technology as the ultimate artistic medium, treating living organisms as raw sculpting materials to create unique "living artworks" with stunning aesthetic value or philosophical significance.
LanguageData.WULA_Trait_Diplomat.degreeDatas.0.label: Diplomat
LanguageData.WULA_Trait_Diplomat.degreeDatas.0.descri: Wula Empire diplomats are known as Heralds. Their courteous etiquette cannot conceal the arrogance and haughtiness inherent to a fallen empire.
LanguageData.WULA_Trait_Nun.degreeDatas.0.label: Nun
LanguageData.WULA_Trait_Nun.degreeDatas.0.description: Wula Empire nuns form the core of the Wula Empire Cathedral. They have abandoned the pampered life of a fallen empire to personally carry out preaching expeditions, embodying their devout faith.
LanguageData.WULA_Trait_Researcher.degreeDatas.0.desc: To uncover and preserve the lost knowledge of the Wula Empire, the Archivists of the Wula Empire Library tirelessly navigate the ocean of books.
LanguageData.WULA_Trait_Connector.degreeDatas.0.label: Dimensional Linker
LanguageData.WULA_Trait_Connector.degreeDatas.0.descr: These Wula citizens have maintained a cross-dimensional link with an extraplanar facility for so long that they have gradually become dehumanized.
LanguageData.WULA_Trait_Broken_Personality.degreeData: This Wula Empire synth lacks a complete personality, making her more like a true machine.
